calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-16-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-16-2005 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Settlement on the record.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Kathy Kollehner.
Michael Rossoff, Esq. for Plaintiff: John Stewart Company, a California corporation.
Defendant: Christine Patterson, present in pop per.
Parties settled, terms read into the record as follows:
JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION IN OPEN COURT shall be entered for Plaintiff against Defendant for restitiution and possession of the premises located at 238 Eddy St., #309, San Francisco, Writ shall be stayed until June 15, 2005, defendant shall pay the sum of $900.00 due on or before June 15, 2005. No one else claims the right to possession, no further stay or new trial and no appeal. Any property left on the premises after June 15, 2005 will be disposed off, securtiy deposits will be retained by plaintiff, rental agrement is declared forfeited. If defendant vacates the premises as agreed, and prepares all documents necessary to vacate the judgment, then plaintiff shall file a dismissal with prejudice.
Parties mutually released and waived any claims against each other.
Parties agreed to terms in open court, matter is deemed settled and trial vacted.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-12-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARNCES: MICHAEL ROSSOFF FOR PLAINTIFF JOHN STEWART COMPANY
WENDY LILLIEDOLL SPECIALLY APPEARING AS LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION FOR DEFENDANT CHRISTINE PATTERSON, ALSO PRESENT.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE DID NOT SETTLE. TRIAL DATE REMAINS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:GARY LOUIE; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED(218)
